theory.hypothesis: Ila can handle a more adaptive spelling session when Sunny keeps the academic target fixed but varies the experience around challenge, speed, visual, low-writing-load, confidence, typing, control, competition.
evidenceSummary: Weak or incomplete spelling evidence keeps the cohort small.
theory.intervention: Use mystery and equivalent valid activities as interventions while preserving spelling evidence quality.
supportCriteria: at least 5 targets when the activity is target-based
delayed or graded work does not contradict the in-app result
reviseCriteria: child asks to change activity or shows repeated hesitation
stated preference conflicts with observed behavior
falsifyCriteria: returned test shows the practiced target did not transfer

plannedMeasurements.reviseCriteria: partial accuracy, hesitation, or mixed engagement
plannedMeasurements.falsifyCriteria: poor transfer, high frustration, or repeated misses

learningExperiments.hypothesis: Ila can handle a more adaptive spelling session when Sunny keeps the academic target fixed but varies the experience around challenge, speed, visual, low-writing-load, confidence, typing, control, competition.
learningExperiments.intervention: Use mystery and equivalent valid activities as interventions while preserving spelling evidence quality.
learningExperiments.comparison: Prior baseline activity evidence and future graded/delayed calibration.
successCriteria: at least 5 targets when the activity is target-based
delayed or graded work does not contradict the in-app result
stopConditions: child asks to stop or avoid the activity
